mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user(user_id, open_id, display_name, wechat_id, phone, avatar_url, verified, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{userId}, #{openId}, #{displayName}, #{wechatId}, #{phone}, #{avatarUrl}, #{verified}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET display_name = #{displayName}, wechat_id = #{wechatId}, phone = #{phone}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, verified = #{verified}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
